subject: they're attacking women

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdef8/2a380d31/19c76fe1/fe4a12/2421536708/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdef8/2a380d31/19c76fe1/fe4a12/2421536708/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
They're attacking women, everyone.
The President of the United States recently attacked a TV host's appearance and character, simply because he doesn't care for how her show covers him:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdef8/2a380d31/19c76fe1/fe4a13/2421536708/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA3X3RydW1wLXR3ZWV0cyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNzAzX1RydW1wVHdlZXRzX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201707_trump-tweets?refcode=e20170703_TrumpTweets_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdef8/2a380d31/19c76fe1/fe4a13/2421536708/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA3X3RydW1wLXR3ZWV0cyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNzAzX1RydW1wVHdlZXRzX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201707_trump-tweets?refcode=e20170703_TrumpTweets_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdef8/2a380d31/19c76fe1/fe4a13/2421536708/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA3X3RydW1wLXR3ZWV0cyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNzAzX1RydW1wVHdlZXRzX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201707_trump-tweets?refcode=e20170703_TrumpTweets_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Sadly, this isn't an isolated incident, and it isn't just Donald Trump.
Last month, her GOP male colleagues in the Senate scolded Senator Kamala Harris for pushing for answers in a Senate Intelligence Committee hearing about Trump's potential ties to Russia.
And Senator Claire McCaskill's questions about Washington Republicans' disastrous health care plan drove Republicans to say that she was just "ranting and raving."
Earlier this year when Senator Warren spoke out against the nomination of Jeff Sessions for Attorney General by reading Coretta Scott King's letter, she was silenced by Senate Republicans. Mitch McConnell attempted to justify it, saying "nevertheless, she persisted."
**Our best shot at putting an end to this sexism is to make sure that we keep the Democratic woman Senators we have -- and add to our ranks.**
Elizabeth and Claire are up for re-election this year, and they're both already being hit with nasty, anti-woman attacks. [**Can you please help keep them in the Senate by donating $3 or more to their campaigns right now, before the Fourth of July holiday?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdef8/2a380d31/19c76fe1/fe4a13/2421536708/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA3X3RydW1wLXR3ZWV0cyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNzAzX1RydW1wVHdlZXRzX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201707_trump-tweets?refcode=e20170703_TrumpTweets_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdef8/2a380d31/19c76fe1/fe4a13/2421536708/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzA3X3RydW1wLXR3ZWV0cyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTcwNzAzX1RydW1wVHdlZXRzX2FjdCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/201707_trump-tweets?refcode=e20170703_TrumpTweets_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

The President of the United States recently attacked a TV host's appearance and character, simply because he doesn't care for how her show covers him: "" "" "" Sadly, this isn't an isolated incident, and it isn't just Donald Trump. Last month, her GOP male colleagues in the Senate scolded Senator Kamala Harris for pushing for answers in a Senate Intelligence Committee hearing about Trump's potential ties to Russia. And Senator Claire McCaskill's questions about Washington Republicans' disastrous health care plan drove Republicans to say that she was just "ranting and raving." Earlier this year when Senator Warren spoke out against the nomination of Jeff Sessions for Attorney General by reading Coretta Scott King's letter, she was silenced by Senate Republicans. Mitch McConnell attempted to justify it, saying "nevertheless, she persisted." Our best shot at putting an end to this sexism is to make sure that we keep the Democratic woman Senators we have -- and add to our ranks. Elizabeth and Claire are up for re-election this year, and they're both already being hit with nasty, anti-woman attacks.
